message:
feat(time): add intrusive single-level timer wheel

Implement a zero-allocation timer wheel using intrusive linked lists as
the foundation for hierarchical timing. The wheel supports:

- Const generic slot count for compile-time configuration
- O(1) insert via deadline-to-slot hashing
- O(1) cancel via direct linked list removal
- O(1) tick processing (amortized)
- Configurable resolution per slot

The TimerNode struct contains intrusive prev/next pointers, allowing
timer registration without heap allocation. Nodes must remain pinned
while linked in the wheel.

Includes 8 unit tests covering insert, cancel, tick, wrap-around,
clear, and expiration queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
